observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and an ISO 8601 added timestamp.
id uses the att- prefix followed by a hash.
standouts: The target field names a specific model variant, chatgpt-gpt-5.5-thinking.
The file is a metadata stub with no embedded session content.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a stable prefixed id and an ISO 8601 timestamp.
Follows a flat key-value schema for channel memory attachments.
concerns: The file contains only metadata and no session content, so its value depends entirely on external resolution.
The target model name chatgpt-gpt-5.5-thinking is nonstandard and its meaning is not defined in the file.
notes: A bare metadata stub that points to a sessions attachment for the capability-workshop channel but carries no session content itself.
questions: What specific session or content does this attachment represent?
